title: Short title
doc_html:
PART X-A. LOUISIANA PROTECTION OF VULNERABLE

ADULTS FROM FINANCIAL EXPLOITATION LAW

§731. Short title

            This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Protection of Vulnerable Adults from Financial Exploitation Law".

            Acts 2016, No. 580, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2017.
doc_text:
PART X-A.  LOUISIANA PROTECTION OF VULNERABLE
ADULTS FROM FINANCIAL EXPLOITATION LAW
§731.  Short title
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Protection of Vulnerable
Adults from Financial Exploitation Law".
Acts 2016, No. 580, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2017.
